description_long: This is a detailed stone sculpture of a robed human figure, likely representing a classical or religious subject. The figure stands upright on a rectangular plinth, with flowing drapery that creates dynamic folds and movement throughout the garment. The head is slightly tilted, and the facial features are finely carved, conveying a sense of expression and character. One arm is bent and raised, while the other holds an object, possibly a staff or a symbolic item, adding to the narrative quality of the piece. The surface shows signs of weathering, with some discoloration and rough patches, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements. The overall craftsmanship and attention to anatomical detail indicate a high level of artistry.
description: A finely detailed stone sculpture of a robed human figure with expressive features and flowing drapery, standing on a rectangular plinth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, detailed drapery, and both arms, with one arm holding an object.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the depth of the drapery and the profile of the head and arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe, the figure's posture, and the less detailed back of the head.
description_view_3: Left-side view focusing on the folds of the robe and the side profile of the figure.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
